An attacker controlling a crawled endpoint can inject arbitrary serialized PHP objects, leading to Remote Code Execution on the TYPO3 server. Exploitation requires administrative privileges to configure a crawler-enabled page and trigger the crawl via a Scheduler task. This has been patched in versions 12.0.11 and 11.0.13.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00389, "percentile": 0.30596}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jr8m-x4p7-p3v5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-29T17:39:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr8m-x4p7-p3v5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jr8m-x4p7-p3v5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8727"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T10:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:39Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8727", "https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-ext-sa-2026-008", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/tomasnorre/crawler/CVE-2026-8727.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr8m-x4p7-p3v5"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tomasnorre/crawler", "summary": "TYPO3 Remote Code Execution in extension \"Site Crawler\" (crawler)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T17:39:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jr8m-x4p7-p3v5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "12.0.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tomasnorre/crawler"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 12.0.0, < 12.0.11"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.0.13", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tomasnorre/crawler"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 11.0.13"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
